assertions.title: Mobile home keeps mode selection prominent and usable

steps.action: Open the app on a 390x844 viewport
steps.observed: Home rendered at / with no overlap or clipping.

steps.expected: Solo, TV Display, and Multiplayer are all visible and tappable
steps.observed: All three mode CTAs were visible in the initial mobile view above the fold and remained readable/tappable.

assertions.title: Fresh solo setup is clear before play starts

steps.expected: Visible setup controls, visible timer, disabled word entry, inactive board/results, one primary start action
steps.observed: Language and timer controls were visible, timer showed 01:00, word entry was disabled, reveal was disabled, and Start solo round was the obvious primary action.

assertions.title: Starting solo creates a playable live round

steps.expected: Setup hides, populated board appears, countdown starts once board is ready, and word entry becomes usable
steps.observed: A populated board, live timer, and enabled word entry appeared and the timer started after the board loaded.

steps.expected: Setup state is hidden during live play
steps.observed: The live round collapsed the home header, mode section, and setup controls on the phone viewport so the board, timer, word entry, and round controls stayed in focus.

assertions.title: Live word entry accepts new words and rejects duplicates predictably

steps.observed: Status changed to 'Added TEST' and the entered-words list contained a single TEST row.

steps.expected: Clear duplicate feedback with no second row
steps.observed: Status changed to 'Already added: TEST' and the entered-words list still contained only one TEST row.

assertions.title: Countdown stays legible and final-seconds urgency is visible

steps.observed: The timer stayed visible beside dictionary status during live play.

steps.expected: Urgency state appears without obscuring letters
steps.observed: A final-seconds warning appeared while the board letters and controls remained readable.

assertions.title: Mid-round setup changes are explicit rather than surprising

steps.action: During a live round, tap +1 min
steps.expected: Active board does not silently mutate and change is gated by an explicit restart/confirm flow
steps.observed: The UI showed 'Restart to apply setup changes. The active board stays locked.' and the board letters stayed the same until timeout/results.

assertions.title: Mobile solo flow is tap-first and overflow-safe

steps.expected: Primary actions remain reachable without horizontal scrolling
steps.observed: No horizontal overflow was observed; add/reveal/restart and show/hide entered-words controls remained reachable with vertical scrolling.

steps.action: Focus word entry and inspect submit action
steps.expected: Input and submit action remain usable while typing
steps.observed: With the input focused and populated, the Add word button remained visible and usable in the narrow viewport.

steps.expected: List drawer expands/collapses without blocking core play
steps.observed: The entered-words section expanded inline and still left live play controls accessible by normal page scrolling.

frictions.description: This local browser automation environment did not display a real mobile software keyboard, so focused-input state was used as the closest approximation for the keyboard-open portion of VAL-SOLO-011.
frictions.resolution: Validated the narrow viewport with the word input focused and populated, confirming the primary submit action remained visible and usable.

summary: Tested 7 assertions on localhost mobile: all 7 passed with no console errors observed. Replacement evidence confirms solo live play now collapses home/setup chrome so the board and in-round controls stay in focus.
